meaning: n.[生化]葡(萄)糖胺,氨基葡(萄)糖
examples: So we told them then about the glucosamine he also taps a lot less and chews a lot less.
N-Acetyl glucosamine is the versatile form of glucosamine for joint and intestinal tissue.
Glucosamine is necessary in the body for the structure and function of the articular cartilage.
Dr. SPIESEL: Well, that supplement is a mixture of two things, one is called glucosamine, one is called chondroitin sulphate.
Dr Madeleine Devey, scientific secretary of the Arthritis Research Campaign, said many people with osteoarthritis had been taking glucosamine sulphate for many years.
